## Challenges

- No functional compatibility issues surfaced during Java 21 compilation.
- Test execution produced no surefire reports, so test counts remained 0/0 both before and after upgrade.

## Limitations

- Test suite appears not to contain runnable unit tests in current Maven setup (0/0 executed). This is a project testing gap, not a Java 21 blocker.
- JaCoCo report artifacts were not generated by `mvn clean verify -Djacoco.skip=false`, indicating coverage tooling is not configured.
